_comment: Add a _ before an option name to comment it out and it wont be added to the apworld
Using 'goal' as the name of an option let you override some of the generated goal parameters
goal.description: How to End your Randomized playthrough.

filler_traps._comment: Using values here let you set a 'recommended' filler_trap percentage or even a default percentage

description: Add checks for items given by rescuing people from Alpha Gang Robots.
This does not include chests requiring defeating robots, which are always included checks (except the post-game locked chests).
Add checks for digging up a fossil in each area.
Each overworld map and dungeon count as a separate area.
The level of drill required is based on the continent.
Add checks for digging for each depth in each area.
Each overworld map and dungeon count as a separate area.
Add keys to the pool to block entrance to dungeons.
The first dungeon in North Euro Plain does not need a key to enter.
Add items to the pool to enable upgrading moves from the base version.
The base state of the 4th move is empty, so it cannot be used without the correct item.
